title: Savory Vietnamese Cassava Stir-fry
description: This savory vegan-friendly cassava stir-fry is tender and perfect for a solo dinner.
instructions: Prepare the cassava by slicing it into thin strips and soaking them in water for at least 15 minutes to remove excess starch.
In a small bowl, whisk together cornstarch with water until smooth. Set aside.
Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add garlic and onion, stir-fry for about 2 minutes until fragrant.
Add cassava and bell pepper to the wok. Stir fry for another 5-7 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender but still crisp.
In a small saucepan, combine soy sauce, fish sauce, sugar, and salt. Mix well and bring to a simmer over medium heat.
Pour the mixture into the wok with the vegetables, stirring quickly to coat everything evenly in the sauce. Reduce heat to low and let cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Thicken the sauce by adding cornstarch slurry gradually until you achieve your desired consistency. Stir constantly to avoid burning.
Remove from heat and serve hot.
